sizing_rule.note: Calculate daily expected move (total expected points ÷ days to expiration), then project underlying value U for each mandated exit date. Use projected U values across exit dates to optimize position sizing via Optimal f calculation. Specific optimal_f value not provided by author.

source_rule_text: Calculate expected price movement per market day by dividing total expected move by number of days to expiration, then use this daily rate to project the underlying value (U) for each mandated exit date when optimizing position sizing.
